action_binding_id.description: Local action binding identifier within a view state.

retry_safe.description: Explicitly marks a command or lifecycle-transition action as safe for automatic action-level retries.

audit_case_id.description: Local render audit case identifier within a view state.

authored_value.description: Explicit authored literal-or-runtime-reference value used by tests, preconditions, and render audit inputs.

unconditional.description: Unconditional authorization condition; the only valid value is true.

value_equals.description: Compares two explicit authorization binding values for equality.

binding_value.description: Explicit runtime binding value. Use from for runtime references and value for literal JSON values.

container_id.description: Local Textual layout container identifier within a view state.

seed_fixtures.description: Seed fixtures used when resolving this content case.

content_source_ref.description: Content source reference. Text resources use text.* identifiers; assets use asset.* identifiers.

context_bindings.description: Bindings that populate child state-machine context fields.

data_loader_id.description: Local data loader identifier within a state machine or view state.

entity_type_display_name.description: PascalCase product/domain type display name stored separately from entity_type_ref.

feature_tag.description: Unprefixed dotted feature grouping tag; feature tags are labels, not typed references.

html_css_class.description: CSS class identifier used only by generated HTML renderer artifacts.

html_css_declarations.description: CSS declarations for generated HTML artifacts.

html_css_property.description: CSS property name used only in HTML renderer style declarations.

html_css_selector.description: Selector over generated HTML state-machine artifacts: root, slots, regions, action bindings, or child state-machine containers.

html_css_value.description: CSS declaration value used only in HTML renderer style declarations. token.<name> references HTML style tokens.

html_style_contract.description: HTML-only styling contract for generated browser artifacts. Selectors and declarations are interpreted as CSS for HTML rendering only.

local_name.description: Local unprefixed identifier used for named slots, outcomes, rules, roles, render audit cases, and viewports.

outcome_name.description: Local application-action or workflow outcome identifier.

query_result_binding.description: Explicitly binds a query outcome value into named state-machine or view-state data for rendering or later bindings.

region_id.description: Local HTML layout region identifier within a view state.

render_profile_item.description: Global audit/golden-image render profile. Audit tooling applies declared HTML and Textual viewport sizes globally to eligible state-machine render audit cases and renderer contracts.

html_viewports.description: Map of viewport identifiers to audit viewport sizes.

textual_viewports.description: Map of viewport identifiers to audit viewport sizes.

runtime_bindings.description: Map from target field names to explicit runtime binding values.

runtime_expression.description: Shared runtime reference expression using $root.path.to.field syntax. Context-specific compiler validation restricts allowed roots and field paths.

schema.description: JSON Schema subset used by the product-spec ontology for payloads, entity types, action inputs, context, and reusable schemas.

schema_map.description: Map of field or parameter names to JSON Schema fragments.

local_signal.description: Emitted state-machine-local signal that triggers the sync rule. Data-refresh signals are not sent between child state-machine instances.

slot_binding.description: View-state-local slot binding. text_slot, asset_slot, and field_slot refer to local slots; action_binding binds a local view-state action binding; literal binds fixed text.

text_slot.description: Local text slot name in the current view state.

asset_slot.description: Local asset slot name in the current view state.

field_slot.description: Local field slot name in the current view state.

slot_name.description: Local slot identifier within a view state.

state_machine_render_audit_case.description: Render-audit case for a state-machine view state. Global render profiles are applied by tooling; cases do not reference render profiles.

precondition_refs.description: Precondition references used to seed rendered entity_type state for this render audit case.

state_machine_signals.description: State-machine-local signal declarations. Accepted signals may be local signals or data-refresh signals; emitted signals are local signals.

system_under_test_ref.description: Typed reference to the primary resource under test.

textual_style_contract.description: Textual-only styling contract for generated Textual screens and widgets. Selectors and declarations are interpreted as TCSS for Textual rendering only.

textual_tcss_class.description: TCSS class identifier used only by generated Textual widgets.

textual_tcss_declarations.description: TCSS declarations for generated Textual widgets and screens.

textual_tcss_property.description: TCSS property name used only in Textual renderer style declarations.

textual_tcss_selector.description: Selector over generated Textual screens, widgets, containers, action bindings, or child state-machine containers.

textual_tcss_value.description: TCSS declaration value used only in Textual renderer style declarations. token.<name> references Textual style tokens.

description: Compiler-normalized output schema for the compiled specification file at spec/generated/compiled/spec.yaml. Contains normalized ids, derived domain_events, derived HTML routes, generated references, endpoint expansions, and empty collection expansions.

render_profiles.description: Global audit/golden-image render profiles. Audit tooling applies them to all eligible state-machine render audit cases and renderer contracts; render audit cases do not reference profiles directly.

title: Compiled-Output Product Spec
